AnyWayData - Data Table Editor & Generator

Edit and Generate Test Data in Your Browser

Use The Application
Easy to Use

The Data Table Editor is designed to be easy to use and uses the Tabulator Data Grid to create an intuitive editing experience. You can create and edit data in the grid and "Set Test From Grid" to view data in your chosen format. Or paste data into the text area and "Set Grid From Text". You can even import and export from
